name: Spiral Turns (Spiral, Curl and Rope Spinning)
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twist, Aida, Chase, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Follow My Leader, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement, Open Hip Twist, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn To L (Lady to R), Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Time Step RF, Turkish Towel
following_figure_names: Chase, Alemana, Hockey Stick, Open Basic Movement, Open Hip Twist, Cuban Break LF, Split Cuban Break LF, Turkish Towel, Sweetheart, Follow My Leader, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn to L, Three Cha Cha Chas Forward, Reverse Top
notes: Alternative finishing positions are the same as Spiral.

comments: Raise L hand to above Lady's R shoulder to circle counterclockwise

steps.action: RF fwd lock to chasse RLR, then turn allowing LF to cross loosely in front without weight (Spiral turn)
comments: Turn is made on ball of RF with foot flat (T of LF)
